high_school.focus_note: Master resume includes all activities; junior/senior years include extra detail.

activities.title: Student Government (Treasurer)
bullets: Managed budget tracking and purchase requests for student events; maintained spreadsheets and monthly summaries.
Coordinated fundraising planning and reconciled event revenues and expenses.

activities.title: Newspaper / Media Club (Editor)
bullets: Edited articles and ensured publication deadlines were met; created a review checklist for consistency.
Helped organize article assignments and tracked progress across sections.

activities.title: Volunteer Tutor (Math)
bullets: Tutored algebra and precalculus students weekly; created practice worksheets and review notes.
Supported peers with homework planning and exam preparation strategies.
Merged shipment, carrier, and warehouse tables in SQL to create weekly performance datasets for reporting.
Built dashboards tracking on-time delivery rate, delay reasons, and route-level volume trends.
Developed regression baselines to explain delays using weather, distance, and seasonal variables; summarized findings for stakeholders.
Supported front-desk operations and handled service requests; logged issues and documented recurring resolutions.
Assisted with weekly occupancy and service summary reports for supervisors.
Supported daily operations and coordinated shift tasks; ensured accurate inventory restocking and end-of-day cleanup.

research.focus_area: Regression modeling and evaluation on observational datasets
bullets: Assisted with data cleaning and exploratory analysis for observational datasets used in regression studies.
Generated model diagnostics and short summaries discussing assumptions and limitations.
Built daily and hourly regression models for bike rental demand; compared baseline OLS to interaction and nonlinear extensions.
Used model selection (AIC/CV RMSE) and diagnostics to choose a final model; applied bootstrap to quantify uncertainty in key effects.
Cleaned and joined multi-source retail data; created summary tables for revenue, repeat customers, and seasonal trends.
Built interactive visual summaries and wrote a short report highlighting top drivers of weekly sales variation.
Explored maintenance ticket categories and turnaround time distributions; created plots to identify bottlenecks.
Tested a regression baseline to estimate turnaround time using category, time-of-year, and workload indicators.

leadership.title: Study Group Coordinator
bullets: Organized weekly study sessions for probability and regression courses; prepared review problems and facilitated discussion.
Coordinated peer support for project debugging sessions and exam preparation.

awards.title: Undergraduate Research Mini-Grant
awards.details: Small grant supporting undergraduate research participation

bullets: Assisted with sorting donations, organizing distributions, and tracking inventory needs during weekly shifts.

metadata.notes: Master resume intentionally includes exhaustive content for downstream ranking/selection into tailored resumes.
